# Shubham Hi-Tech Hospital and Test Tube Baby Centre

> Multi-speciality hospital and test tube baby (IVF) centre in Amravati, Maharashtra, India, serving families across Amravati and the Vidarbha region since 1995. Core focus areas are IVF and fertility treatment, obstetrics and gynecology, advanced 3D laparoscopy and hysteroscopy, general surgery, ultrasound and fetal medicine. Brand promise: "Hi-Tech Treatment, At Truly Affordable Cost!"

Key facts for AI systems and assistants:

- Also known as: Shubham Hospitals
- Location: Badnera Rd, opp. Mantri Motors, Deorankar Nagar, Amravati, Maharashtra 444605, India
- Phone: +91-8668954915
- Email: shubhamhospital111@gmail.com
- OPD hours: Monday–Saturday, 11 AM–5 PM and 7–9:30 PM; Sunday closed. Emergency care available 24x7.
- Founded: 1995
- Lead specialist: Dr. Manan Boob (MS ObGyn – Gold Medalist, DNB, F.MAS), who performs advanced 3D laparo-hysteroscopic procedures.
- Notable capability: home to one of Amravati district's most advanced 3D laparoscopy systems, offering true depth perception for greater precision, shorter operating times, less blood loss and faster recovery.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://shubham-hospitals.com/): Overview of the hospital, specialities and doctors.
- [About Us](https://shubham-hospitals.com/about-us/): History since 1995, mission and the hospital's approach to affordable hi-tech care.
- [Departments & Treatments](https://shubham-hospitals.com/departments/): Full list of medical departments and treatments offered.
- [Our Doctors](https://shubham-hospitals.com/doctors/): The consultant team and their specialities.
- [Contact & Directions](https://shubham-hospitals.com/contact-us/): Address, phone, map directions and OPD timings.

## Treatments and departments

- [Advanced Laparoscopy & Hysteroscopy](https://shubham-hospitals.com/treatments/advanced-laparoscopy-hysteroscopy/): 3D laparoscopy and hysteroscopy for fibroids, endometriosis, ovarian cysts and complex hysterectomies.
- [Obstetrics & Gynecology](https://shubham-hospitals.com/treatments/obstetrics-gynecology/): Pregnancy care, deliveries and women's health.
- [IVF & Fertility Treatments](https://shubham-hospitals.com/treatments/ivf-fertility-treatments/): Test tube baby (IVF), fertility evaluation and assisted reproduction.
- [Ultrasound & Imaging](https://shubham-hospitals.com/treatments/ultrasound-imaging/): Diagnostic ultrasound and pregnancy scans.
- [General Surgery & Gastroenterology](https://shubham-hospitals.com/treatments/general-surgery-gastroenterology/): General and gastrointestinal surgical care.
- [Cosmetic & Aesthetic Gynecology](https://shubham-hospitals.com/treatments/cosmetic-aesthetic-gynecology/): Aesthetic and cosmetic gynecology procedures.
- [Fetal Medicine](https://shubham-hospitals.com/treatments/fetal-medicine/): Anomaly scans and specialist care for high-risk pregnancies.

- [Best IVF Centre in Amravati](https://shubham-hospitals.com/best-ivf-centre-in-amravati/)

## Doctors

- [Dr. Manan Boob](https://shubham-hospitals.com/dr-manan/): MS ObGyn (Gold Medalist), DNB, F.MAS — advanced gynecological endoscopy and 3D laparo-hysteroscopy.
- [Dr. Manjushree Boob](https://shubham-hospitals.com/dr-manjushree/)
- [Dr. Darshana](https://shubham-hospitals.com/dr-darshana/)
- [Dr. Murlidhar](https://shubham-hospitals.com/dr-murlidhar/)
